_meta.description: Pre-built plug-and-play agent templates — outcome-driven, goal-based

templates.name: Get 10 Qualified Leads in 24h
templates.description: Generate 10 qualified B2B leads for your business within 24 hours — complete with contact info, company context, and ICP scoring. No setup required.
templates.task_description: Find 10 qualified B2B leads matching my ideal customer profile. For each lead: company name, decision-maker name and role, email (if findable), company size, and a 1-line reason why they are a good fit. Score each lead 1-10 for ICP match. Export as a ready-to-use list.
setup_steps: Define your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP): industry, company size, location

templates.name: Close Your First €1k Deal
templates.description: Full end-to-end sales cycle: find prospects, send personalised outreach, follow up, and book a discovery call — all automated. Designed to close your first €1,000 deal.
templates.task_description: Run the full sales pipeline to close a €1,000 deal: find 20 qualified prospects in my niche, write and send personalised cold emails, follow up automatically 3 days later, qualify interested replies, and book discovery calls. Track pipeline value and report daily.
setup_steps: Configure your target niche and ideal customer profile
Review and approve the first batch of outreach messages

templates.name: Automate Customer Support in 1 Hour
templates.description: Set up 24/7 AI customer support in under 1 hour: auto-resolves 70% of tickets, escalates edge cases, tracks satisfaction. Saves 30–40 hours/month of manual support.
templates.task_description: Set up automated customer support: import FAQs, classify all incoming tickets by urgency, auto-resolve common questions, escalate complex issues with full context, and generate daily support analytics. Time-to-first-response under 2 minutes.
setup_steps: Import your FAQ document into the support-bot knowledge base
Configure escalation rules (which issues need a human)
Set up your email or chat integration to receive tickets

templates.name: Hire Your Best Candidate Faster
templates.description: Cut time-to-hire from 6 weeks to 2 weeks: sources candidates, screens CVs, schedules interviews, manages pipeline — fully automated.
templates.task_description: Automate the full recruitment pipeline: source candidates from job boards, screen CVs against job requirements, send personalised outreach to top candidates, schedule screening calls, and maintain the hiring pipeline. Report weekly on candidate funnel metrics.
setup_steps: Upload your job descriptions and requirements
Connect your calendar for interview scheduling

templates.name: 10x Your Content Output This Week
templates.description: Full content marketing on autopilot: SEO blog posts, social media, email newsletters, and video scripts — 10x output with zero extra headcount.
templates.task_description: Run the full content automation pipeline: write 2 SEO-optimised blog posts, create daily social media content for LinkedIn/Instagram, generate a weekly email newsletter, produce video scripts, and repurpose long-form content into multiple formats. Track all content performance.
setup_steps: Set your brand voice and tone guidelines
Configure target keywords for SEO content
Connect social media accounts via integrations

templates.name: Run Your E-commerce Store on Autopilot
templates.description: 100% automated e-commerce: order processing, inventory sync, customer emails, social posting, and daily P&L. Run a full Shopify store without lifting a finger.
templates.task_description: Automate the full e-commerce operation: process Shopify orders, validate payments, place supplier orders, sync inventory, handle support tickets, send transactional and marketing emails, post daily social content, research trending products, and generate daily P&L reports.
setup_steps: Connect your Shopify store via API
